Let me summarize what I've found:

For personal credit cards that meet all three criteria (No foreign transaction fees ✅, Purchase protection ✅, and at least $100,000 credit limit ✅):

1. **Gold Rewards Card** - 
   - Foreign transaction fee: 0% ✅
   - Purchase protection: 105 days, up to $7,500 per claim ✅
   - Credit limit: $17,500 to $112,500 ✅ (max $112,500 > $100k)
   - Requires Rho-Bank+ premium subscription
   - Annual fee: $0.00
   - 2.5% cash back on all purchases
   - Min credit score: 720

2. **Platinum Rewards Card** -
   - Foreign transaction fee: 0% ✅
   - Purchase protection: 135 days, up to $17,500 per claim ✅ (from doc_credit_cards_platinum_rewards_card_007)
   - Credit limit: $25,000 to $150,000 ✅ (max $150,000 > $100k)
   - Annual fee: $200.00
   - Min credit score: 750
   - 10% cash back on all categories (wow)
   - $150 rebate on annual fee if monthly spend > $7,500

3. **Diamond Elite Card** -
   - Foreign transaction fee: 0% ✅
   - Purchase protection: 150 days from purchase, Unlimited coverage ✅
   - Credit limit: $37,500 to $375,000 ✅ (max $375,000 > $100k)
   - Invitation-only, min credit score 780
   - 5% cash back on all purchases
   - Annual fee: need to check
